item.name: Paissa Threadpuller
item.description:
Currently in training as a weaver, and looks the part.

Use item to acquire the paissa threadpuller minion.
item.tooltip:
Death by ungainly paissa...
thought mortifies Vanu worse
than forgetting sundrop dance!
   - Eenu Vanu
item.specialactiondescription: Removes all detrimental effects from all allies within range.
